name: conduit-browser
description: A dark translucent one-to-eight-pane Electron browser with reliable Pane 1 following, adjustable scale, isolated routing, per-pane IP/location details, audio routing, and a simple local test page.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-entry-v18.js && node --check src/main-v18.js && node --check src/workspace-v18.js && node --check src/preload-v18.js && node --check src/page-preload-v18.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v18.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && npm test
